seo.title: LeadOps — Business Lead Extraction

pricing.heading: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pay once per export. No subscriptions.
pricing.priceDescription: One-time payment for full CSV download

items.question: What sources do you support?
items.answer: Clutch.co, GoodFirms.co, Google Maps, and LinkedIn enrichment. More sources coming soon.

items.question: How is the CSV formatted?
items.answer: UTF-8 with BOM, all fields quoted, commas escaped. Columns: source, business_name, website, phone, email, location, category, rating.

items.question: How does deduplication work?
items.answer: Leads are deduplicated by website + phone. Only the first occurrence is kept — no duplicates in your export.

items.question: How long is my export available?
items.answer: 7 days from completion. After that, the file is automatically deleted.
